title: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING

figures_detected.description: Two diagrams showing towing hook locations on the Nissan Micra K11. Top diagram shows Super S model front bumper with towing hook behind a cover. Bottom diagram shows standard model rear bumper with exposed towing hook.

content_blocks.text: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING
Always pull the cable straight out from the vehicle. Never pull on the hook at a sideways angle.

content_blocks.description: Towing hook locations for Super S model (front, behind cover) and standard model (rear, exposed)

callouts.label: Towing hook
callouts.position: front bumper area, Super S model

callouts.label: Cover
callouts.position: over towing hook, Super S model front bumper

model_notes: Super S model has towing hook behind a cover on front bumper. Standard model has exposed towing hook on rear bumper.
